title: PasiWorldGuardAddon
description: WorldGuard addon. This add flags to feed, interact, keepxp, keepinventory
body:
on the latest version of minecraft and worldguard your plugins don't work because you can't "raid"? this plugin is a SMALL patch for this problem that does it all the time and not at the source and adds some interesting flags that should have been in the basic version of WorldGuard for a long time.

**If you have any suggestions or bug, write to me and I will try to implement them :>**

# ![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/pOGWLtU9?style=flat-square&label=Downloads&labelColor=0400ff&color=00ba06) ![Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/pOGWLtU9?style=flat-square&label=Followers&labelColor=0400ff&color=00ba06) ![Wersja](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/pOGWLtU9?style=flat-square&label=Plugin%20Version&labelColor=0400ff&color=00ba06) ![Mc version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/pOGWLtU9?style=flat-square&label=Minecraft%20Versions&labelColor=0400ff&color=00ba06)

# Plans for future features:
- fly flag

<details>
<summary>Cells</summary>

1. 1 ✅ (idk)
1. 10 ✅ (idk)
1. 100 ✅ (idk)
1. 250 ❌
# #
</details>

# Installation
1. Stop server
1. Place plugin in plugins folder
1. Start server


<details>
<summary>Guide</summary>
  
```
1. /rg flag <region name> pasiinteract deny
2. /rg flag <region name> interact allow
3. /rg flag <region name> ride allow
```

</details>


known plugins that have this problem
- roullete
- gsit(GsitPro also)
- simple-sit
- sit

### Flags
| Flag | Oldest version | Notes |
|--------------------------|----------|------|
| pasiinteract                    |  0.0.1  | fix WG ride bug |
| pasifeed                   |  0.0.1  | allow feed a animals |
| keepinventory                   |  0.0.2  | allow keepinventory |
| keepxp                   |  0.0.2  | allow keepxp |
